info.name: Mushroom Farm IoT Platform API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Mushroom Farm IoT Monitoring Platform.

Covers authentication, plant/room/device management, live sensor readings, relay control, growth cycles, harvests, firmware OTA, alerts, climate advisory, reports, thresholds, health checks, device provisioning (ESP32), and contact inquiries.

Auth: Cookie-based JWT (access_token httpOnly cookie set on login). CSRF token required for state-changing requests.

Default credentials: admin / admin123

variable.description: Device secret key for ESP32 device API auth

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints: login, logout, refresh tokens, get current user, and change password.

exec: // Extract CSRF token from Set-Cookie header

request.description: Authenticate with username/password. Sets httpOnly cookies: access_token, refresh_token, csrf_token. Rate limited: 5 requests/minute.
Return the currently authenticated user's profile info.
Validate the refresh_token cookie and issue new access + refresh tokens. Optionally pass refresh_token in body.
Change the current user's password. Requires old_password for verification.
Logout the current user. Clears access_token, refresh_token, and csrf_token cookies.

item.name: Plants
item.description: Manage mushroom farm plants (facilities). Plants are top-level organizational units containing rooms.

request.description: List all plants for the current user's organization. Non-admin users see only their assigned plants.
Get a specific plant by ID. Ownership check applied.

body.raw:
{
  "owner_id": 1,
  "plant_name": "Kimandi Oyster Farm",
  "plant_code": "KOF-001",
  "plant_type": "OYSTER",
  "location": "Warehouse Block A",
  "address": "Plot 42, Industrial Area",
  "city": "Thika",
  "state": "Kiambu",
  "pincode": "100100",
  "latitude": -1.0396,
  "longitude": 37.0900,
  "plant_size_sqft": 5000.0,
  "no_of_rooms": 8,
  "established_date": "2025-01-15",
  "admin_user_id": 1
}

request.description: Create a new plant with an existing admin user attached. ADMIN+ only. Provide either admin_user_id OR new_admin (not both). Plant types: OYSTER, BUTTON, SHIITAKE, MIXED.
Create a new plant with a new admin user created inline. The new user gets ADMIN role and the plant auto-assigned.
Update plant details. Partial update supported. ADMIN+ only.
Soft-delete a plant (sets is_active=false). ADMIN+ only.
Get all active rooms for a specific plant.

item.name: Rooms
item.description: Manage grow rooms within plants. Room types: SPAWN_RUN, FRUITING, INCUBATION, STORAGE.

request.description: List all rooms for the current user's organization.
Get a specific room by ID. Owner check via plant.
Create a new room in a plant. ADMIN/MANAGER. Room types: SPAWN_RUN, FRUITING, INCUBATION, STORAGE.
Update room details. ADMIN/MANAGER.
Change room status. SUPER_ADMIN only. Statuses: ACTIVE, SUSPENDED, MAINTENANCE, INACTIVE.
Soft-delete a room. ADMIN+ only.

item.name: Devices
item.description: Manage IoT devices (ESP32 sensors/actuators). Includes provisioning, assignment, linking, approval, kill-switch, and QR code management.

request.description: List all devices for the current user. Includes both assigned (via rooms) and unassigned devices.
Get a specific device by ID with ownership verification.
Provision a new device (factory step). ADMIN+ only. Auto-generates a license_key. Device starts with PENDING status. Device types: ESP32, ESP8266, ARDUINO, PLC.
Assign a device to a plant. ADMIN+ only. Generates MQTT credentials and sets status to ACTIVE.
Update device details or assign to a room. ADMIN/MANAGER.
Link a PENDING device to a room via QR scan. Sets status to PENDING_APPROVAL. ADMIN+ only.
List devices with PENDING subscription status. ADMIN+ only.
List devices awaiting admin approval (PENDING_APPROVAL status). ADMIN+ only.
Approve or reject a PENDING_APPROVAL device. ADMIN+ only. APPROVE generates MQTT credentials; REJECT reverts to PENDING.
Enable or disable a device remotely. ADMIN+ only. DISABLE suspends the device; ENABLE reactivates it. Publishes MQTT control command.
Permanently revoke a device. ADMIN+ only. Sets subscription to EXPIRED, deactivates device, publishes DISABLE via MQTT.
Upload a QR code image (base64 PNG) for a device. ADMIN+ only.
Get the stored QR code image (base64) for a device.
Deactivate a device. ADMIN+ only.

item.name: Live Data & Relay Control
item.description: Live sensor readings from Redis, relay state management, relay automation config, and relay scheduling.

request.description: Get all live sensor readings from Redis for the current owner's devices.
Get a single device's live reading from Redis.
Get a room's live reading from Redis.
Get current relay states for a device from Redis.
Send a relay command to a device. Writes to Redis (30s TTL) and publishes via MQTT if device uses MQTT mode. Relay types: CO2, HUMIDITY, TEMPERATURE, AHU, HUMIDIFIER, DUCT_FAN, EXTRA.
Get relay automation configs for a device. Returns all 7 relay types with mode (MANUAL/AUTO/SCHEDULE).
Upsert relay automation configs for a device. Modes: MANUAL, AUTO, SCHEDULE. Threshold params: CO2, HUMIDITY, TEMPERATURE.
Set all relays to AUTO mode with default parameter mappings.
Set all relays to MANUAL mode.
List all relay schedules for a device.
Create a relay schedule for a device. days_of_week is a bitmask (127 = all days, Mon=1 to Sun=64). Time format: HH:MM.
Update an existing relay schedule. Partial update supported.
Delete a relay schedule.

item.name: Dashboard
item.description: Dashboard summary endpoints for overview counts, admin analytics, and per-plant dashboards.

request.description: Get dashboard summary counts: total_plants, total_rooms, total_devices, active_devices, active_alerts, critical_alerts. Filtered by owner and assigned plants.
Get all live sensor readings from Redis for the current owner's devices. Returns array of reading objects.
Comprehensive admin dashboard with device status breakdown, subscription breakdown, room type breakdown, alert summary, per-plant overviews, and recent device events. ADMIN+ only.
Get plant-specific dashboard data: room summaries with device info, device counts, alert counts.

item.name: Growth Cycles
item.description: Manage growth cycle lifecycle for rooms. Stages: INOCULATION -> SPAWN_RUN -> INCUBATION -> FRUITING -> HARVEST -> IDLE.

body.raw:
{
  "room_id": 1,
  "current_stage": "INOCULATION",
  "expected_harvest_date": "2026-05-01T00:00:00Z",
  "target_yield_kg": 120.5,
  "notes": "Oyster mushroom batch #42 - Blue Oyster variety. Substrate: pasteurized straw.",
  "auto_adjust_thresholds": true
}

request.description: Start a new growth cycle for a room. Auto-deactivates any existing active cycle. ADMIN/MANAGER.
Advance a growth cycle to the next stage. Optionally specify current_stage to jump to a specific stage. Triggers climate advisory auto-adjustment.
Jump a growth cycle to a specific stage instead of sequential advancement.
Get the current active growth cycle for a specific room.
List all growth cycles for a room, newest first. Supports pagination.

item.name: Harvests
item.description: Log and track harvest yields with grade classification (A, B, C) and summary analytics.

request.description: Log a new harvest entry. OPERATOR+ role. Grades: A (premium), B (standard), C (processing grade). Weight in kg.
List harvests for a specific room, newest first.
Get yield summary across all rooms, grouped by period (monthly/weekly). Includes total weight, harvest count, and grade breakdown.
Get yield summary for a specific room, grouped by period.

item.name: Alerts
item.description: View, acknowledge, and resolve sensor/device alerts. Alert types: CO2_HIGH, CO2_LOW, TEMP_HIGH, TEMP_LOW, HUMIDITY_HIGH, HUMIDITY_LOW, DEVICE_OFFLINE, SENSOR_ERROR.

request.description: List alerts filtered by owner. Optional filters: severity, is_resolved, limit, offset.
List all unresolved (active) alerts.
Get a specific alert by ID.
Acknowledge an alert (set is_read=true). OPERATOR+ role.
Resolve an alert (set is_resolved=true). MANAGER+ role.

item.name: Thresholds
item.description: Manage sensor threshold configurations per room. Parameters: CO2, HUMIDITY, TEMPERATURE.

request.description: Get all threshold configurations for a room (CO2, HUMIDITY, TEMPERATURE).
Update thresholds for a room. ADMIN/MANAGER. Publishes updated config to devices via MQTT.

item.name: Firmware OTA
item.description: Firmware management: upload binaries, list versions, trigger OTA rollouts, track update status. Supports both disk-based and DB-based firmware storage.

formdata.value: Added relay ACK confirmation, improved WiFi reconnection logic, EEPROM state persistence for all 7 relays.

request.description: Upload a firmware .bin file to disk. ADMIN+ only. Computes SHA256 checksum. Marks previous versions as inactive.
List all firmware versions, newest first.
Get latest active firmware version metadata. Requires device auth headers (X-Device-ID, X-Device-Key).
Download firmware .bin file by ID. Used by ESP32 during OTA. Returns binary with X-Checksum-SHA256 and X-Firmware-Version headers.
Trigger OTA rollout to selected devices via MQTT. ADMIN+ only. Pass empty device_ids array to target all active devices.
Get OTA update status for all active devices.

formdata.value: Web Serial flashing build with improved boot sequence

request.description: Upload a .bin firmware file and store binary in the database. ADMIN+ only. For Web Serial and device use.
Get latest active firmware file metadata (no auth required). Used by devices and Web Serial.
Download latest active firmware .bin binary (no auth). Returns binary with checksum headers.
List all firmware file versions with metadata. Requires auth.
Download a specific firmware version .bin (no auth). Used by devices.
Deactivate a firmware file version. ADMIN+ only.

item.name: Historical Readings
item.description: Query historical sensor readings and export data as CSV.

request.description: Get historical sensor readings for a room. Supports datetime range filtering and pagination.
Get historical sensor readings for a specific device.
Export room readings as a CSV file download. Streams up to 50,000 rows with columns: timestamp, co2_ppm, room_temp, room_humidity, outdoor_temp, outdoor_humidity, bag_temp_1..10.

item.name: Reports
item.description: Generate and download CSV reports for plants.

request.description: List all reports for the current user's organization.
Get a specific report by ID.
Generate a CSV report for a plant. MANAGER+ only. Report types: DAILY, WEEKLY, MONTHLY, CUSTOM. Formats: PDF, EXCEL, CSV (only CSV currently generated).
Download a generated report file.
Delete a report and its file from disk. ADMIN+ only.

item.name: Climate Advisory
item.description: Climate guidelines and real-time advisory system. Provides recommended thresholds per mushroom species and growth stage.

request.description: Get climate advisory for a room based on its current growth stage. Returns recommended thresholds, current deviations, stage duration info, transition reminders, and suggestions.
List all climate guidelines. Returns recommended temp, humidity, CO2 ranges for each plant type and growth stage.
Get a specific climate guideline by plant type (OYSTER/BUTTON/SHIITAKE/MIXED) and growth stage (INOCULATION/SPAWN_RUN/INCUBATION/FRUITING/HARVEST/IDLE).

body.raw:
{
  "temp_min": 15,
  "temp_max": 20,
  "humidity_min": 85,
  "humidity_max": 95,
  "co2_min": 400,
  "co2_max": 800,
  "temp_hysteresis": 1.0,
  "humidity_hysteresis": 3.0,
  "co2_hysteresis": 50,
  "duration_days_min": 5,
  "duration_days_max": 10,
  "notes": "Oyster fruiting: maintain high humidity, low CO2 for primordia initiation."
}

request.description: Update a climate guideline. ADMIN+ only. Partial update supported.
Apply the recommended guideline thresholds to a room based on its current growth stage and plant type. Publishes updated config to devices via MQTT. ADMIN/MANAGER.

item.name: Health
item.description: Health check and monitoring endpoints for platform observability.

request.description: Basic health check for Railway health probes (no auth). Returns healthy/degraded/unhealthy based on DB, Redis, and MQTT status. Note: This endpoint is at /health, outside the /api/v1 prefix.
Detailed health check with service latencies, device counts, uptime, and Python version. Requires authentication.
Raw platform metrics from Redis counters: telemetry_messages_total, mqtt_reconnects, relay_acks, per-endpoint API request counts, active_alerts. SUPER_ADMIN only.

item.name: Device API (ESP32)
item.description: Endpoints called by ESP32 devices directly. Auth via license_key/mac_address or X-Device-Id/X-Device-Key headers.

request.description: Register or re-register an ESP32 device using license_key + mac_address pair. Device must be pre-provisioned. Rate limited: 5/minute.
ESP32 polls this to check provisioning status and get MQTT credentials. Returns: pending, pending_approval, ready (with MQTT creds), suspended, or expired. Rate limited: 10/minute.

body.raw:
{
  "co2_ppm": 850.0,
  "room_temp": 21.5,
  "room_humidity": 88.2,
  "bag_temps": [22.1, 22.3, 21.8, 22.0, 21.9, 22.2, 21.7, 22.4, 21.6, 22.0],
  "outdoor_temp": 18.3,
  "outdoor_humidity": 65.0,
  "relay_states": {
    "CO2": true,
    "HUMIDITY": false,
    "TEMPERATURE": true,
    "AHU": true,
    "HUMIDIFIER": false,
    "DUCT_FAN": true,
    "EXTRA": false
  }
}

request.description: Submit a sensor reading from an ESP32 device. Requires X-Device-Id and X-Device-Key headers. Stores in PostgreSQL + Redis, checks thresholds, pushes WebSocket updates.
Health check / heartbeat from ESP32 device. Updates device_ip, wifi_rssi, free_heap, and confirms device is online.
Poll for pending relay commands for a device. Commands are one-time: the Redis key is deleted after reading. Requires device auth headers.

item.name: Inquiries
item.description: Contact form submissions from the marketing site. Public endpoint for submissions, admin-only listing.

body.raw:
{
  "inquiry_type": "DEMO",
  "name": "John Kamau",
  "email": "john.kamau@mushfarm.co.ke",
  "phone": "+254712345678",
  "farm_size": "2000 sqft, 6 rooms",
  "message": "Interested in the IoT monitoring system for our oyster mushroom farm in Kiambu. Currently running 6 fruiting rooms with manual monitoring. Would like to schedule a demo to see the real-time dashboard and automated climate control features."
}

request.description: Submit a contact or demo inquiry (public, no auth required). Inquiry types: GENERAL, DEMO, SUPPORT, PARTNERSHIP. Rate limited: 5/minute.
List all contact inquiries, newest first. ADMIN+ only.
